title: utils: fix endless write of resize event
body:
issue introduced with c82166afabd63f6271990be89ffa6609d3dc6712

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: Change LGTM, but the F28/cloud Podman test is still unhappy.
Looks like f28 cloud image is getting the bad libsemanage package.
Going to force merge since the Fedora 28 problem is not related to this.

@rhatdan I think cloud podman is an allowed failure, so we should be able to ignore it and merge with Homu.

Probably should not be an allowed failure (that stems back to the early days of podman-in-podman testing), but it's a good thing for now
